_meta.notes: Field names and values match Surge Discovery create form (Full Mode, 9 steps)

tagline: Anchor Solana creator content on-chain and earn automatic royalties when it drives protocol
full_description: Inkdrop lets Solana-native creators mint a compressed NFT (via Metaplex Bubblegum) that stores a SHA-256 fingerprint of any published piece of content — a thread, essay, or clip — alongside a configurable royalty DAG in an Anchor PDA. When downstream protocols include an Inkdrop content fingerprint in their transaction memo field, a Helius-powered indexer detects the attribution and triggers a CPI call that routes a configurable percentage (5–15%) of the associated value to the creator's wallet

logo.note: Surge requires PNG or JPG. Convert SVG → PNG before upload.

dev_tools: Solana Memo Program (attribution tagging in tx instructions)

pitch_deck.note: Surge requires PDF. Convert PPTX → PDF before upload.

pitch_video.note: Must be public/unlisted YouTube URL. Max 800 seconds.

team_description: The founding team includes a Solana smart contract engineer with prior experience shipping Anchor programs on mainnet and a frontend developer with background in creator monetization tooling at a web3 media startup. Both are active participants in the Solana developer ecosystem and have shipped open-source tooling used by Farcaster and Mirror communities.

roadmap.goal: Deploy core on-chain primitives and validate content anchoring end-to-end on Solana devnet.
deliverables: Anchor program deployed to devnet: handles cNFT minting via Bubblegum, stores SHA-256 content hash and royalty DAG in PDA, exposes claim instruction for treasury withdrawals
Functional Next.js prototype allowing URL or markdown paste, wallet signature, and one-click cNFT mint with fingerprint stored in Bubblegum leaf metadata
Internal attribution memo spec v0.1 documented and tested with a simulated downstream transaction on devnet confirming CPI royalty routing fires correctly

roadmap.goal: Launch closed beta on Solana mainnet with 50 invited creators and onboard 3 protocols to adopt the attribution memo standard.
deliverables: Mainnet deployment of Anchor program with audited royalty DAG logic, supporting up to 5 co-creator splits at basis-point precision

Helius webhook integration live in production: indexes attribution events in real time, writes to PostgreSQL cache, surfaces data in per-creator dashboard showing earnings, citing transactions, and top referring protocols
Signed integration agreements with 3 Solana-native protocols to include Inkdrop fingerprints in their transaction memo fields, with public documentation of the open attribution memo spec v1.0

roadmap.goal: Open public access, reach 500 active creator wallets, and process $50k in cumulative attributed royalty payouts.
deliverables: Public launch with self-serve onboarding: any creator can connect wallet, anchor content, and configure royalty splits without a whitelist
Batch claim UI allowing creators to sweep all pending PDA royalties in a single transaction, with fee estimation and claim history export
SDK and npm package (TypeScript) enabling any Solana protocol to add Inkdrop attribution memo tagging to their existing instruction builders with fewer than 10 lines of code
